sys_script_client.description: 2.7.1 | 2021-12-07 | raj | DFCT0010681 - "Suspense Date Must be in the Future" - Task Form loses data on "Update" or "Create Task" Added to trap the Suspense Date in the future error before submission so the form isn't cleared.
sys_script_client.messages: The suspense date must be in the future.
sys_script_client.name: Task - onSubmit - New Task Check Date
sys_script_client.sys_name: Task - onSubmit - New Task Check Date
